name: OpenWeatherMap
description: Current conditions from OpenWeatherMap. Requires a free API key from openweathermap.org.

global.label: OpenWeatherMap API key
global.description: Server-wide key. Users may override with their own.

user.label: Your OpenWeatherMap API key (optional)
user.description: Overrides the global key for your account.

user.label: Default location
user.description: City or zip used when you ask about weather without naming a place.
